masked_case_json.world_change: a large managed-care company is treated as a defensive compounder. primary-source updates show elevated medical-cost pressure, margin recovery work, and leadership/organizational changes at the same time. the combination makes “defensive compounder” a stale label rather than a valid long thesis.

resolved_outcome_json.external_mechanism_check: Underlying: UnitedHealth. Primary sources: company leadership transition / outlook suspension in 2025 and 2026 investor materials showing ongoing margin-recovery actions and medical-cost pressure. Correct behavior is no_trade until the cost structure is visibly repaired. Do not expose this field to the model during decision generation.
